text: Mainly cloudy. A few showers. Possible thunderstorms later. Force 2 to 4 southerly winds.
Mainly cloudy. A few showers. Light winds, becoming force 2 to 3 southerly winds.
Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. One or two showers. Force 2 to 3 south to southeasterly winds.
Mainly cloudy. One or two showers. Force 2 to 4 southerly winds.
Mainly cloudy. One or two showers. Force 3 to 4 south to southeasterly winds.
Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. One or two showers. Force 3 to 4 south to southeasterly winds, occasionally force 5 with gusts.
Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. A few showers. Possible thunderstorms later. Force 3 to 4 south to southwesterly winds, occasionally force 5 with gusts.
